method: Prices from Inceptron's own public OpenAI-compatible catalog API https://api.inceptron.io/v1/models (no auth; pricing.prompt / pricing.completion in USD per token x 1e6; input_cache_reads for cache tier); cross-checked against OpenRouter endpoint data (provider_name=='Inceptron'). The public API lists 6 priced text LLMs. All 6 in/out prices agree exactly between api.inceptron.io and OpenRouter (kimi-k2.6-fast has no OR endpoint but is in the native API). Prices changed vs 2026-06-23 snapshot: GLM 5.2 now 1.16/3.62 (was 1.20/4.20), GLM 5.1 now 1.19/3.74 (was 1.40/4.40), Kimi K2.6 now 0.66/3.41 (was 0.66/3.50), Kimi K2.7 Code now 0.85/3.50 (was 0.75/3.50). HQ Sweden (SE), datacenters Finland (FI) per OpenRouter provider metadata.

models.notes: fp4 quant, 1.05M context. Cache read $0.21/1M. Inceptron model id zai-org/GLM-5.2. Verified live api.inceptron.io 2026-07-01: in $1.15 / out $3.62 (input was briefly 1.16 earlier in the day).
fp8 quant, 202K context. Cache read $0.60/1M. Inceptron model id zai-org/GLM-5.1-FP8. Verified live api.inceptron.io 2026-07-01: in $1.40 / out $3.74 (input was briefly 1.19 earlier in the day).

int4 quant, 262K context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.18/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.7-Code. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.85 / out 3.50). Input up vs 2026-06-23 (was 0.75).

int4 quant, 262K context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.14/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.66 / out 3.41). Output down vs 2026-06-23 (was 3.50).

fp4 quant, 262K context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.40/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6-Fast. Higher-throughput 'Fast' tier of Kimi K2.6. No OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (native API only).
fp8 quant, 196K context. Cache read $0.05/1M. Inceptron model id MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.15 / out 0.90).
